content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.79%, IT/Pharma/Metal/Realty all up 2%+, VIX collapsing 5.5% to 18.6. Sun Pharma's Organon deal driving pharma; power and metals strong on demand themes. However, book is already 60% deployed with multiple positions in profit — focus shifts to risk management and trailing stops, not chasing extended breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position recovering today (+1.81%). Strong Q4 fundamentals (PAT +35% YoY, GNPA 1.45%). SL at 76.50 is below recent support 76.95. Thesis intact, no change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op detected on review — current SL 1029 is already above entry 984 (locked-in ~4.6% gain) per stored values. Per no-op rule, switching to HOLD via position_actions instead. Skipping this MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold ETF, marginally negative. SL at 119 gives reasonable breathing room. Geopolitical hedge intact. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op — SL 1418 already above entry 1412.94. Switching to HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Down 1.4% but recovering today. Q4 results Apr 30 (3 days away) is binary catalyst. SL at 2295 (-3.3%) is reasonable for earnings risk. Holding through the print given Nestle's strong sector read-through and brokerage Buy ratings."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 405.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op — SL 405 already at entry 404.50 (breakeven locked). Switching to HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position down 0.9% but stock up 5.4% today on volume; faded from intraday high 1824. Power-cluster strength intact. SL at 1760 gives room. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1705.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Stock surged +7.17% on Organon deal news; entered today at 1734, now 1736.60. Tightening SL from 1685 to 1705 (just below VWAP 1726 / pivot zone) to lock risk after big move. Target 1830 unchanged near 52w high."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 316.00,
      "new_target": 335.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 315 to 316 — moves to entry-level breakeven (entry 320.50, near breakeven). Stock near 52w high; Q4 results May 19. Locking risk to ~1.5% max loss."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY order at 23.65 still working. Not stacking a duplicate. Letting the limit work; pharma sector strong today supports the thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY order at 612 still working. Not stacking a duplicate."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY order at 443 still working. Power cluster already represented via TORNTPOWER + NTPC + POWERGRID; if this fills, it pushes cluster concentration high — letting it be but NOT adding."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 76.50 sits below S2 76.95. Strong fundamentals support holding through noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1029 — well above entry 984, locking ~4.6% gain. Best-in-class GNPA 0.93%, brokerage TP 1143. No change needed; SL already trailing aggressively."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL 119 appropriate for ETF volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1418 already above entry 1412.94 — locked in breakeven+. Recent 52w high; momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Holding into Apr 30 earnings. Sector tailwind from Nestle's print supports thesis. SL 2295 acceptable risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 405 already at breakeven. Stock near 52w high, Q4 mid-May upcoming."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Sector strength + capacity expansion thesis intact. SL 1760 (-2.8% from CMP) is reasonable; not trailing yet given position is still slightly negative."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1705.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL after +7% move on Organon news; 1705 is just below VWAP/pivot zone, limits risk to ~1.7%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 316.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL to near-breakeven; stock at 52w high range, capping downside ahead of May 19 results."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "SAIL, VEDL, IKS, UTIAMC all monitored but not actionable: SAIL extended at 15-yr highs after 17% MTD; VEDL has demerger event risk Apr 29-May 1 (avoid until ex-date settles); IKS has TruBridge integration risk despite volume signal; UTIAMC posted Q4 loss — wait for normalization. AXISBANK gap-down absorbed but Rs 20K cr equity raise dilution overhang keeps me out. IDFCFIRSTB fraud/one-off issues — pass.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 60% deployed with 9 CNC positions across PSU bank, HFC, gold, FMCG (2), pharma, power (2 + POWERGRID = 3 power names = cluster watch). With pending TATAPOWER limit at 443 still open, if filled the power cluster will be 4 names — at that point I need to consider trimming. Today's tick: NO new entries (deployment hysteresis), focus on locking risk via tighter SLs on SUNPHARMA and POWERGRID. PNBHOUSING SL already excellently placed above entry. Daily P&L +0.33%, well within limits. Capital preservation > chasing breakouts on a +0.8% Nifty day."
}
